import React,{useEffect,useRef}from"react";import{useDispatch,useSelector}from"react-redux";import{fetchProducts}from"../redux/slices/productSlice";// Asigură-te că acest import este corect
import{Swiper,SwiperSlide}from"swiper/react";import{Navigation,Pagination}from"swiper/modules";import"swiper/css";import"swiper/css/navigation";import"swiper/css/pagination";import"./TopDishes.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TopDishes=()=>{const baseURL=process.env.REACT_APP_SERVER_URL_DEV;console.log("Base URL:",baseURL);const swiperRef=useRef(null);const dispatch=useDispatch();// Obține produsele din Redux
const{products,loading,error}=useSelector(state=>state.products);// Filtrarea produselor pentru categoria "topDishes"
const topDishes=products.filter(product=>product.category==="topDishes");// Încarcă produsele când componenta se montează
useEffect(()=>{if(products.length===0){dispatch(fetchProducts());}},[dispatch,products.length]);if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});}if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:["Error: ",error]});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dishes-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Farfurii de top"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"swiper-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Swiper,{ref:swiperRef,modules:[Navigation,Pagination],pagination:{clickable:true,dynamicBullets:false},spaceBetween:15,slidesPerView:4,slidesPerGroup:4,breakpoints:{1024:{slidesPerView:4,slidesPerGroup:4},768:{slidesPerView:3,slidesPerGroup:3,spaceBetween:8},581:{slidesPerView:2,slidesPerGroup:2,spaceBetween:5},312:{slidesPerView:1,slidesPerGroup:1,spaceBetween:5},0:{slidesPerView:1,slidesPerGroup:1,spaceBetween:5}},children:topDishes.map(dish=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SwiperSlide,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"dish-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:`${baseURL}${dish.image.startsWith("/")?dish.image:`/${dish.image}`}`,alt:dish.title||"Imagine indisponibilă",className:"daily-menu-image"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-dishes-overlay",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:dish.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"overlay-text",children:dish.description}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:[dish.price," lei"]})]})]})},dish._id))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"swiper-button-prev",onClick:()=>swiperRef.current.swiper.slidePrev(),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("svg",{xmlns:"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",viewBox:"0 0 24 24",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("path",{d:"M15 19L8 12l7-7"})})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"swiper-button-next",onClick:()=>swiperRef.current.swiper.slideNext(),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("svg",{xmlns:"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg",viewBox:"0 0 24 24",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("path",{d:"M9 5l7 7-7 7"})})})]})]});};export default TopDishes;
